description:
Access all the tools you need for data analysis with our comprehensive solution. Start shifting your focus from data to discovery and take advantage of NGS workflows, interpretation and visualization.


Bug fixes
- Fixed an issue where mouse-based range selection did not work in the cloning editor.
- Fixed an issue where the SAM/BAM/CRAM Mapping Files importer failed for long reads starting with an unaligned region longer than twice the circular reference length.
Changes
The bundled Java version is Java 21.0.10, where we use the JRE from the Azul OpenJDK builds.
Advanced notice
- The AGP export (legacy) tool will be retired in a future version of the software.
- The legacy Workbench policy property 'run_on_workbench_when_server_is_available' will not be supported from version 27.0. The workbench_save_to_server policy property, available since version 25.0, should be used instead.
